description: Neutrino physics frontiers - sterile neutrinos, mass mechanism, anomalies.

distractors: has been completely ruled out by all neutrino oscillation experiments globally
has been definitively established beyond any reasonable scientific doubt now
was never seriously proposed by any reputable physicist as a hypothesis

facts.truth: is unknown - seesaw and Dirac both viable
distractors: has been determined to be the standard Higgs mechanism with certainty
is impossible because neutrinos are definitively massless fundamental particles
has been proven to be the type-I seesaw mechanism beyond any doubt
has been definitively and conclusively explained by sterile neutrino oscillations confirmed by multiple experiments
was proven to be nothing more than a simple calculation error with absolutely no physics implications whatsoever
does not actually exist because all reactor neutrino experiments perfectly match theoretical predictions always

facts.context: The gallium anomaly in neutrino experiments:
facts.truth: shows deficit suggesting possible new physics
distractors: has been completely explained by standard neutrino oscillation physics
was proven to be experimental error with no anomaly present at all
confirms the standard three-neutrino model with no modifications needed

facts.truth: remains unknown pending double beta decay results
distractors: has been proven by observation of neutrinoless double beta decay already
has been ruled out proving neutrinos must be Dirac particles only
cannot be tested experimentally by any known or proposed method

facts.truth: favors normal ordering but not definitive
distractors: has definitively established inverted ordering with high confidence now
proves all three masses are exactly equal with no hierarchy present
cannot be determined because neutrinos are fundamentally massless

facts.truth: is constrained but not precisely measured
distractors: has been precisely measured by KATRIN to be exactly 0.8 eV already
is exactly zero because neutrinos have no mass at all fundamentally
cannot be measured by any direct or indirect experimental technique

facts.context: The LSND anomaly suggesting sterile neutrinos:
facts.truth: was not confirmed by MiniBooNE in same channel
distractors: was perfectly confirmed by MiniBooNE proving sterile neutrinos exist
was proven to be a statistical fluctuation with no real physics signal
has been definitively explained by three-neutrino standard oscillations
has never been experimentally observed despite many decades of dedicated experimental searches ongoing worldwide
is theoretically forbidden by fundamental Standard Model physics principles and cannot possibly occur ever
was first observed in the 1960s and is now considered well-established textbook particle physics knowledge
cannot possibly be detected because they are completely absorbed before reaching the surface of the Earth
have been definitively proven not to exist which directly contradicts standard geophysical heat models
are purely theoretical constructs and absolutely no experiment can detect them ever under any conditions

facts.context: The next galactic supernova neutrino detection:
facts.truth: would provide thousands of events in detectors
distractors: is impossible because supernova neutrinos cannot reach Earth at all
would provide only single-digit events even in largest detectors
has already occurred from SN 1987A providing complete information

facts.context: The cosmic neutrino background from Big Bang:
facts.truth: exists but has not been directly detected
distractors: has been directly detected by multiple neutrino observatories now
cannot exist according to standard cosmological Big Bang model
has been ruled out by precision cosmological CMB observations
